title: Personal agenda
description: The user's own activities, cutting across projects. It is not a project deliverable: it lives in runtime/agenda.json and is the source of the home page. An activity may relate to no project, to one, or span several of them.

date.description: Date of the last update, YYYY-MM-DD format.

notes.description: Free-form notes on the agenda as a whole.

items.description: The activities, in no particular order: the display order is decided by the date.

text.description: What has to be done, in one line, the way the person would say it. Not a formal title: 'ask Smith about the export format' is fine, 'Alignment with client contact' is not.

projects.description: The projects the activity touches. Empty for personal or organisational activities; more than one when the activity genuinely spans them (e.g. a meeting covering two engagements). The names may be projects that exist in projects/ or free text, for work not yet opened in the tool.

due.description: The day the activity should be done, YYYY-MM-DD format. Absent = no date: it stays in the inbox until a day is given to it.

time.description: Time of day as HH:MM. It orders the items within a day and records when something actually has to happen: a call at 17:30 on a Friday is already too late. People dictating a note almost never say a time, so the model proposes a plausible one from the moment mentioned ('tomorrow morning') and from office hours; it stays a suggestion the user corrects in the preview. Absent when pinning a moment makes no sense.

status.description: State of the activity. 'done' is final; to postpone something you move 'due', you do not change the status.

priority.description: Urgency declared by whoever wrote the activity. Use sparingly: if everything is high priority, nothing is.

source.description: How the activity came to be: dictated out loud, typed by hand, or proposed by the agent during a conversation.

notes.description: Detail that does not fit in the text: context, what is needed to do it, who is involved.

created.description: The day the activity was written down, YYYY-MM-DD format.

completed.description: The day it was marked as done, YYYY-MM-DD format.
